data.name: Gray Haven : Witch's Garden
data.detailed_description:
Embark on a journey through the realm of 'Nightmare' as you assist Friends who have lost their memories. From Half-Deamon Warrior to Dimension engineers and enigmatic priests, extend an invitation to these individuals from various worlds to find solace within the safe haven of 'Grey Haven.’

Meet New Friends




During your exploration of the 'Nightmare,' you will encounter a diverse cast of Friends. Protect and assist them. Together, you will conquer the challenges that lie ahead.

Into the Nightmare




Explore the depths of the 'Nightmare' and hunt down the formidable Deamons that dwell within. Adapt your combat style by seamlessly switching between entirely different weapons, creating a unique fighting style that suits your preferences.

Slay the Nightmares




From powerful demons fueled by twisted emotions and memories to deadly creatures lurking within the realm of nightmares, they will relentlessly try to kill you. Armed with various weapons, combos, and all means at your disposal, eliminate them.

Build Your Haven




Welcome to 'Grey Haven,' a secure haven boasting a witch's cottage and a quaint garden. Build your own home, gather essential resources, and Decorate your house.

data.short_description: HACK AND SLASH where you explore Nightmares to rescue girls. Build homes for rescued girls, gather resources, and make farms!
data.supported_languages:
韓文, 英文, 日文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-3240
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1060
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-3470
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 2060
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Gray Haven : Witch's Garden
data.detailed_description:
You've lost your memories. The nightmares are waiting. And the girls? They're counting on you.

Gray Haven is a yuri action RPG where you explore twisted nightmares, rescue lost girls, and build a sanctuary to call your own.

With fluid controls and hard-hitting combat, every fight plays out exactly the way you want it to.

Each girl carries memories she can't recover alone — and secrets she's never told anyone.

Save them from the nightmare. Earn their trust. And they'll give you everything.

Over 300 voiced lines recorded by professional voice actors bring every moment to life.

The nightmares are brutal — grotesque monsters, deadly traps, and horrors that don't stop coming.

But so are you.

Master fluid, instantly responsive controls and unleash any playstyle you can imagine — guns, gauntlets, greatswords, katanas, and more.

When the fighting's done, Gray Haven is yours to shape.

Stack towers of bones. Plant flower gardens. Build the sanctuary — or the nightmare — that only you could create.

This world belongs to you.

data.short_description: The girls you meet in the nightmare will become your everything. Fight through twisted dungeons and rescue the lost girls. The ones you save will stay by your side, in your haven. Yuri Action RPG Gray Haven Explore, fight, and love.
data.supported_languages:
Korean, English, Japanese*, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-3240
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 1060
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-3470
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 2060
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
